chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-2098 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on M.A. 8363/2019. 3. For hearing of main case 10.08.2022 Mr. Farhad Ali Abro advocate holding brief on behalf of Mr. Faisal Nadeem Abro, advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ayaz Ali Rajpar, Assistant A.G. Sindh. Mr. Nazar Muhammad Memon, Addl.P.G Sindh. ----- Learned counsel for the petitioner is not present and on his behalf Mr. Farhad Ali Abro advocate is holding brief. However, we have seen that this case was last fixed on 22.08.2019 and thereafter petitioner has never taken any interest to pursue this petition which is reflected from the fact that even today the petitioner nor his counsel is present. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed in non-prosecution along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
